scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently -n API,WEB -c auto "npm run dev --workspace=@campusbaza/api" "npm run dev --workspace=@campusbaza/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace=@campusbaza/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace=@campusbaza/web
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace=@campusbaza/contracts && npm run build --workspace=@campusbaza/config && npm run build --workspace=@campusbaza/validation
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspace=@campusbaza/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@campusbaza/web
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.seed:catalog: npm run build:packages && npm run seed:catalog --workspace=@campusbaza/api
scripts.seed:dealers: npm run build:packages && npm run seed:dealers --workspace=@campusbaza/api
scripts.db:indexes:check: npm run build:packages && npm run db:indexes:check --workspace=@campusbaza/api
scripts.db:indexes:ensure: npm run build:packages && npm run db:indexes:ensure --workspace=@campusbaza/api
scripts.check:release: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm audit --audit-level=high
